subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God, verdant leaf upon the Lote-Tree of the Utmost Boundary! Upon thee rest the glory of God, His grace and His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله الورقه النابته علی سدره المنتهی علیک بهاء الله و فضله و جوده و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
